text:
Created attachment 178199
Patch

Maintainer of pear_Payment_DTA: will you give me Maintainer ship of this port? I Maintain a lot of pear-* Ports.

Here is an update for your pear Port:

Poudriere build fine for:
9.3 amd + i386
10.3 amd + i386
11.0 amd + i386
12-current amd + i386 (r307551)

Make test is also fine.

Cheers
jochen
